problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: The key to What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? is Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier — specifically Nanoparticle delivery to — which would help 1,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
